title: Open the AGV Status Screen and Check AGV Locations and Current Error Codes
summary: Access the AGV Status screen from the system HMI and review the displayed AGV locations and any current AGV error codes.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when AGV location information or currently displayed AGV error codes need to be checked from the system HMI.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret AGV error code meanings when the source does not define them.
Do not use this procedure for corrective action or AGV recovery steps, because the source only supports access to the AGV Status screen and observation of displayed information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the system HMI, open the AGV Status screen, review displayed AGV locations and current error codes, and record the information exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This is an HMI-based observation procedure supported as safe by the source candidate.
Do not infer corrective actions from displayed AGV error codes unless supported by another approved source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the system HMI display
AGV STATUS control in the upper-left corner of the display

access_required: Access to the system HMI display
system_preconditions: The system HMI display is available for use.
The AGV STATUS control is available in the upper-left corner of the display.

visual_references.description: AGV Status screen used to view AGV locations and current AGV error codes.
System HMI screen context for locating the AGV STATUS access point from the display.

steps.title: Open the AGV Status screen
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen that displays AGV location and current error information.
steps.instruction: On the system HMI display, press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen.
steps.expected_result: The AGV Status screen opens on the HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV Status screen is accessible from the AGV STATUS control in the upper-left corner of the display.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV Status screen does not open or cannot be accessed from the AGV STATUS control described in the source.

actions.label: Press AGV STATUS
actions.exact_action: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the system HMI display context while locating the AGV STATUS access point in the upper-left corner of the display.
Reference the target AGV Status screen that should appear after pressing AGV STATUS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the AGV Status screen cannot be accessed from the AGV STATUS control described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen.

steps.title: Confirm the AGV Status screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Verify that the correct HMI screen has been opened before reviewing AGV information.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the "AGV Status" screen is displayed.
steps.expected_result: The displayed screen matches the AGV Status screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI shows the AGV Status screen referenced by the source.
steps.failure_condition: A different screen is displayed or the AGV Status screen cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Verify AGV Status screen
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the "AGV Status" screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Compare the displayed HMI screen to the AGV Status screen reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed screen cannot be confirmed as the AGV Status screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen.
Figure 4-17, titled AGV Status Screen, appears on page 45.

steps.title: Review AGV locations
steps.purpose: Inspect the screen for the location information shown for AGVs.
steps.instruction: Review the location shown for the AGVs on the screen.
steps.expected_result: AGV location information is visible on the AGV Status screen.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV locations are displayed on the AGV Status screen.
steps.failure_condition: AGV location information is not visible or cannot be determined from the displayed screen.

actions.label: Review AGV locations
actions.exact_action: Review the location shown for the AGVs on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the AGV location information shown on the AGV Status screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV location information is not visible on the AGV Status screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

steps.title: Review current AGV error codes
steps.purpose: Inspect the screen for any error codes currently shown for an AGV experiencing an error.
steps.instruction: Review any error codes shown for an AGV that is currently experiencing an error.
steps.expected_result: Any current AGV error codes shown on the screen are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Current AGV error codes, if present, are visible on the AGV Status screen.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV condition cannot be interpreted from the available source because the source states only that current error codes are shown and does not define their meanings.

actions.label: Review AGV error codes
actions.exact_action: Review any error codes shown for an AGV that is currently experiencing an error.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for any current AGV error codes displayed for AGVs experiencing an error.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed AGV condition cannot be interpreted from the available source because the source only states that current error codes are shown and does not define their meanings.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

steps.title: Record displayed AGV status information
steps.purpose: Capture the observed AGV location and error information exactly as displayed for follow-up or escalation.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed AGV location information and any current error codes exactly as shown on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The displayed AGV location information and any current error codes are documented exactly as shown.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed AGV locations and any displayed current error codes are recorded without interpretation or modification.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information cannot be captured exactly as shown or cannot be clearly read from the screen.

actions.label: Record displayed information
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed AGV location information and any current error codes exactly as shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the AGV Status screen as the reference for the location and current error code information to be recorded.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed information cannot be clearly read or recorded exactly as shown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

success_criteria: The AGV Status screen is accessed from the system HMI.
Any current AGV error codes shown on the screen are reviewed.
Displayed AGV location information and any current error codes are recorded exactly as shown.
healthy_conditions: The AGV STATUS control in the upper-left corner of the display opens the AGV Status screen.
The AGV Status screen displays AGV locations.
The AGV Status screen displays any current AGV error codes for AGVs experiencing an error.
failure_conditions: The AGV Status screen cannot be accessed from the AGV STATUS control described in the source.
The displayed screen cannot be confirmed as the AGV Status screen.
AGV location information is not visible on the screen.
The displayed AGV condition cannot be interpreted from the available source because error code meanings are not defined.
Displayed AGV information cannot be recorded exactly as shown.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the AGV Status screen cannot be accessed from the AGV STATUS control described in the source.
Escalate if the displayed AGV condition cannot be interpreted from the available source because the source only states that current error codes are shown and does not define their meanings.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV Status screen for viewing AGV locations and current AGV error codes.
System HMI display context for locating the AGV STATUS control in the upper-left corner.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen. The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

missing_details: The source does not define the meanings of AGV error codes shown on the AGV Status screen.
The source does not provide corrective actions based on displayed AGV error codes.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required; this procedure is limited to HMI observation.
